TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_David_Britton, title = David_Britton, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Britton} }

S.FORM: ==== David Britton ==== David Britton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1958, byacing te 8 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 82 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1980 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Dallas Mavericks. Britton mqwas beh St John's College,Durham pqwasan biru.1969 kawas masoq pqwasa biru. 1989 kawas, Britton biru Savoy Books"Lord Horror" cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

==== David Britton ==== David Britton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1958, byacing te 8 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 82 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1980 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Dallas Mavericks. Britton mqwas beh St John's College,Durham pqwasan biru.1969 kawas masoq pqwasa biru. 1989 kawas, Britton biru Savoy Books"Lord Horror" cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ==== *a*i* βritton ==== *a*i* βritton s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa new jork, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ. βritton mqwas~ɕ βeħ s~ɕt *oħnʔs~ɕ ʦ~ʨolleɣe,*urħam pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ mas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕa βiru. **** kawas~ɕ, βritton βiru s~ɕa*oj βooks~ɕ"lor* ħorror" ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
